MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-27-2026 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Jun-01-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Set For Trial On May-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ESCAPE SF LLC's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

Defendant EscapeSF LLC's Motion to Set Aside Default is GRANTED.

Defendant moves under Code of Civil Procedure section 473(b), which allows a court to set aside a default based on mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect.

Notwithstanding Moving Defendant's failure to lodge its proposed responsive pleading (see Code of Civil Procedure section 473(b)), the court finds good cause and orders the default against it set aside and grants Moving Defendant 10 court days leave to file an answer, the time starting upon entry of this order.

Moving Plaintiff must prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

A proposed order is submitted.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
